problem.summary: Define the corpus artifact shape for counter-backed rocprofiler/rocprof and roofline evidence without inventing counters when access is blocked.
constraints: Template-only; no counter-backed claim until a report artifact exists
Record metric set, replay mode, permissions, clocks, and hardware
If counters are blocked, label profile-attempted-blocked

verification.method: Run the target kernel's own correctness harness first, then attach rocprofiler/rocprof or blocked-counter artifacts to the corresponding measured record.

curation.notes: Promoted from the v2 extension backlog as a template-only task. No performance, correctness, or profiler evidence is claimed yet.
